title: 32 interdisciplinary frameworks attributed to specific thinkers
public_claim: 32 interdisciplinary frameworks attributed to specific thinkers is a method packet for a structured handoff built from a long research conversation that started with an art terminology question ("shape vs form") and pivoted into a graduate-grade redesign of the intelligence cycle and counterintelligence practice.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is method operationalization: name the analytic technique, define its use condition, connect it to a case or judgment problem, record failure modes, and decide whether it is a live method page or a reference packet.
use_value: It turns analytic methods into reusable instruments with inputs, steps, failure modes, interpretation rules, and reviewer actions.

claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
